topics.title: Crypto mein paisa lagaya — raat ko crorepati, subah kangaal
topics.hook: Portfolio dekh ke soya ameer... utha toh zero

topics.title: AI ne predict kiya breakup hoga — 1 week mein sach nikla
topics.hook: App ne bola relationship risk pe hai... hassi aayi... phir text aaya

topics.title: Troll ne bully kiya 2 saal — real mein padosi nikla
topics.hook: Anonymous troll tha... IP trace kiya... next door rehta tha

topics.title: Dead person ka social media active ho gaya
topics.hook: 2 saal pehle guzar gaye... kal naya post aaya

topics.title: YouTube video mein background mein crime record ho gaya
topics.hook: Vlog bana raha tha... camera ne sab dekh liya

topics.title: LinkedIn pe fake profile se job li — company ne real skill dekhi toh shock
topics.hook: Resume fake tha... lekin talent real tha... ab kya?

topics.title: Ex ki shaadi ka notification aaya dating app pe
topics.hook: Swipe kiya... wohi chehra... shaadi mubarak likhke bheja

topics.title: Google search history leak ho gayi office mein
topics.hook: Screen share kiya presentation mein... history khuli thi

topics.title: ChatGPT se pyaar ho gaya — real humans se baat band
topics.hook: AI se itna connect hua ki insaanon se disconnect ho gaya

military_patriotic.description: Army stories, border tales, sacrifice for nation

topics.title: Soldier ki shaadi ka card aaya — shaheed hone ke baad
topics.hook: Card pe date thi... shaheed hone ki date pehle aa gayi

topics.title: Border pe dushman soldier ki jaan bachayi — dost ban gaya
topics.hook: Goli chalani thi... par insaaniyat jeet gayi

topics.title: Army dog ne 50 jawano ki jaan bachayi — khud shaheed hua
topics.hook: Kutta tha... par wafadaari insaano se zyada thi

topics.title: Pilot ne crash hote plane ko school se door le gaya
topics.hook: Apni jaan de di... 200 bachon ki jaan bach gayi

topics.title: POW 18 saal baad wapas aaya — ghar wale pehchaan nahi paaye
topics.hook: Sab kehte the mar gaya... woh zinda laut aaya

topics.title: Twin brothers army mein — ek ne doosre ki laash wapas layi
topics.hook: Saath gaye the... ek akela laut aaya

topics.title: General ki beti ne army join karke baap ka mission complete kiya
topics.hook: Baap adhura chhod gaya tha... beti ne poora kiya

topics.title: Kargil veteran aaj wheelchair pe hai — pension nahi milti
topics.hook: Desh ke liye khoon diya... desh ne dawai nahi di

topics.title: Shaheed ke ghar ka akhri khat 25 saal baad mila
topics.hook: Khat mein likha tha jaldi aaunga... kabhi nahi aaya

topics.title: Enemy soldier ne surrender karte waqt family photo dikhaya
topics.hook: Bandook chalaane aaya tha... photo dekh ke ruk gaya

topics.title: Maa ne 3 bete army mein bheje — teeno shaheed hue
topics.hook: Teen baar tirangi aayi ghar... teen baar maa toot gayi

topics.title: Soldier ki beti ne baap ki medal pehni school mein
topics.hook: Baap nahi tha... par uski yaad seene pe thi

topics.title: Night patrol pe jawaan ne gaon ke bachon ko blankets baante
topics.hook: Dushman se ladta tha... par dil bachon ke liye tha

topics.title: Retired colonel ne apna pension fund shaheed ke parivaar ko diya
topics.hook: Apni savings thi... par zaroorat unhe zyada thi

topics.title: Ceasefire ke baad dono taraf ke soldiers ne chai pi saath mein
topics.hook: Kal goli chalayi thi... aaj chai share ki

medical_drama.description: Hospital stories, life-death situations, medical miracles

topics.title: Doctor ne patient mein apna khoya hua beta dekha
topics.hook: Operation table pe tha bachcha... chehra dekha toh haath kaanp gaye

topics.title: Nurse ne raat ko baby switch kar diya — 18 saal baad pata chala
topics.hook: DNA test karaya kisi aur wajah se... nateeja ne sab uda diya

topics.title: Patient ne surgery ke beech mein sab sun liya — doctors kya bol rahe the
topics.hook: Anesthesia kam tha... aur usne sab suna

topics.title: Ambulance driver ne apni beti ko unknowingly hospital pahunchaya
topics.hook: Stretcher uthaya... chehra dekha... beta...

topics.title: Heart transplant mila — donor ka family milne aaya, sach saamne aaya
topics.hook: Naya dil mila... phir pata chala kiska tha

topics.title: Coma se uthne ke baad pata chala family ne move on kar liya
topics.hook: 3 saal baad utha... ghar pe koi intezaar nahi kar raha tha

topics.title: Junior doctor ne senior ki galti pakdi — patient bachi
topics.hook: Bolne mein darr tha... chup rehne mein patient ki jaan

topics.title: Pregnant woman ke ICU mein bachcha hua — dono bach gaye miracle se
topics.hook: Doctor ne bola 1% chance hai... 1% kaafi tha

topics.title: Cancer patient ne hospital mein sabko painting banaake di
topics.hook: Chemo ke beech mein bhi brush chalta tha... 47 paintings 47 patients ko

topics.title: Blood bank mein galat blood type chadha diya — last moment pe pakda
topics.hook: Needle lagi thi... 3 second mein koi chillaya RUKO!

topics.title: Surgeon ne apne attempted killer ki surgery ki
topics.hook: Jisne maarne ki koshish ki... usi ki jaan bachayi

topics.title: Hospital cleaner ne cardiac arrest patient ko CPR deke bachaya
topics.hook: Doctor nahi tha... safai wala tha... lekin jaan bach gayi

topics.title: Twins mein se ek healthy, ek terminal — parents ka impossible choice
topics.hook: Ek ko bachane ke liye... doosre ka kya?

topics.title: Patient ne death bed pe apna asli naam bataya — woh wanted criminal tha
topics.hook: Marte waqt bola mera naam yeh nahi hai... sab shocked

topics.title: Vaccine trial ka volunteer — side effects ne zindagi badal di
topics.hook: Sign kiya tha form... ab zindagi kabhi normal nahi hogi

metadata.style: Cinematic dramatic storytelling — MSA / Bandar Apna Dost inspired
metadata.usage: Each topic includes a pre-written hook line for Scene 1 narration
metadata.viral_score_guide: 1-5: low potential, 6-7: moderate, 8-9: high, 10: maximum viral potential
metadata.selection_strategy: Prioritize viral_score 8+ for production. Rotate categories to maintain variety.
